## Changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Typecheck passes (`web:typecheck` / `mobile:typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`web:lint`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`web:test`)
- [ ] Zod validation on any new boundary; no untrusted input reaches the DB/AI
- [ ] Ownership + tenant checks on any new user-scoped query
- [ ] No secrets, no PII/audio content in logs
- [ ] a11y: states (loading/empty/error), focus, contrast, reduced-motion
- [ ] Docs updated (README/ADR/API) if behaviour or contracts changed
